channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Combined use of cannabis and alcohol may increase driving impairment and subjective intoxication
item.description: 1. Co-use of cannabis edibles and alcohol augmented driving impairment and subjective intoxication. Evidence Rating Level: 2 (Good) Previous research ...

item.title: No nurse is better than a bad nurse in your child’s home [PODCAST]

item.title: WHO says six hantavirus cases confirmed so far
item.description: There are six confirmed cases of hantavirus so far out of eight suspected ones following an outbreak on a cruise ship, the World Health Organization s...

item.title: Hantavirus scare revives COVID-era conspiracy theories
item.description: An outbreak of the deadly hantavirus on a Dutch-flagged cruise ship is reviving conspiracy theories about vaccines, alleged depopulation campaigns and...
